props.name: text
props.description: The text content to shuffle.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional CSS class for the wrapper element.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles applied to the wrapper element.

props.name: shuffleDirection
props.description: "up" \

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration (s) of the strip slide per letter.

props.name: maxDelay
props.description: Max random delay per strip when animationMode = "random".

props.name: ease
props.description: "power3.out"

props.name: threshold
props.description: Portion of the element that must enter view before starting.

props.name: rootMargin
props.description: ScrollTrigger start offset (px, %, etc.).

props.name: textAlign
props.description: Text alignment applied via inline style.

props.name: onShuffleComplete
props.description: Called after a full run completes (and on each loop repeat).

props.name: shuffleTimes
props.description: How many interim scrambled glyphs to scroll past before the final char.

props.name: animationMode
props.description: "evenodd"

props.name: loop
props.description: Repeat the shuffle indefinitely.

props.name: loopDelay
props.description: Delay (s) between loop repeats.

props.name: stagger
props.description: Stagger (s) for strips in "evenodd" mode.

props.name: scrambleCharset
props.description: Characters to use for interim scrambles; empty keeps original copies.

props.name: colorFrom
props.description: Optional starting text color while shuffling.

props.name: colorTo
props.description: Optional final text color to tween to.

props.name: triggerOnce
props.description: Auto-run only on first scroll into view.

props.name: respectReducedMotion
props.description: Skip animation if user prefers reduced motion.

props.name: triggerOnHover
props.description: Allow re-playing the animation on hover after it completes.
